classificationReason: Exact command discovered the remote repository and Codex-target plugin, then stopped at the installer confirmation prompt with no installed Codex state under isolated CODEX_HOME.

command.cmd: npm view plugins name version repository.url homepage bin engines scripts.postinstall --json

codexPluginJson.name: sealos
codexPluginJson.description: Sealos deployment, database, object storage, and app-building skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Deploy apps and connect Sealos cloud services
interface.longDescription: Use Sealos in Codex to assess cloud-native readiness, generate production Dockerfiles, build or reuse container images, convert Docker Compose services into Sealos templates, deploy and update workloads on Sealos Cloud, connect cloud databases, configure S3-compatible object storage, and build Sealos Desktop apps with SDK integration guidance. The plugin bundles Sealos Agent Skills under ./skills/ and is invoked as $sealos in Codex or /sealos in Claude Code-compatible hosts.
defaultPrompt: Deploy this repo to Sealos Cloud.
Containerize this app and deploy it to Sealos.
Create private S3 object storage and wire env vars.

truthfulLabel: compatibility discovery evidence: command/package/repository/plugin discovery succeeded; documented command reached interactive confirmation without installed Codex state.
